description: Original captured output from Yahoo, a URL, or a user-facing app export.
required_evidence: Timestamp, input string, capture source, raw response or exported text.

description: Human-readable description of what the capture appears to show.
required_evidence: Result classification and comparison to expected output.

description: Repeat capture or cross-check with a control symbol or endpoint.
required_evidence: Second timestamped result or clear explanation why retest is not possible.

description: Structured row describing the field, endpoint, enum, symbol, or behavior change.
required_evidence: Change type, affected object, evidence link/path, impact note.

description: Append or update reference tables while preserving stable IDs.
required_evidence: Updated CSV/workbook row and validation output.

description: Public summary of what changed and what is still uncertain.
